commit_scope: Parallel 4th kernel tools (band precompile+tester, API bundle, BMF+organs). Drivers in /tmp, binaries in ~/4th-binaries, audit+spec updated. All via the jit-lower + fourth-walker-emit pipeline from the large parallel move.

commands: parallel cell emission of tools (bands, tester, api-bundle, bmf+organs)
fourth-walker-emit + jit-lower Form sources balanced + emitting probe

results.emissions: all cells produced C via 4th pipeline
results.binaries: fkwu, fkapi, fkjit, bmf compiler, organ drivers etc in ~/4th-binaries/
results.probe: fk_arms present and counted in emitted fkw (m4c) and later m4e paths
results.audit: fkw emission now carries probe; parity for fib holds on emitted walker

ci_validation.notes: Large parallel tooling move. 4th kernel internal; CI will exercise via make / audit in form/validate flows.

deploy_validation.notes: Internal dev/CI binaries and Form sources for the fourth kernel lane. No hostinger/public deploy impact. Audit + spec + evidence are the promotion surface.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: emitted fkw (m4c walker) and advanced fk4 etc match walker for fib/sum/ack; fk_arms probe present and counted; jit-lower + fourth-walker-emit produce valid lowered native C for 4th tools.
test_flows: form validate on jit-lower-band and fourth-walker
